name: @intentsolutionsio/flash-loan-simulator
description: Simulate and analyze flash loan strategies including arbitrage, liquidations, and collateral swaps

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install flash-loan-simulator\\n  or /plugin install flash-loan-simulator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
